channel.title: No Links Feed
channel.description: Articles missing link and guid elements

item.title: Article Without Any Link
item.description: This article has no link or guid element at all.

item.title: Another Linkless Article
item.description: Missing both link and guid. Should be filtered out during ingest.

item.title: Third Orphan Article
item.description: No way to uniquely identify this article without a URL.
